notes: THE ghost scene: one walker, one parked car (engine idling part of the time), and multipath reflection ghosts.
All times are seconds from the first frame of the fixture.
Walker r(t) segments are measured from the strong-mover point band in the fixture (dop ~ -1 m/s, walking speed); residual vs the linear hint is well under the 15 m match window.
The walker has NO gating azimuth (az_hint is informational only) - its az wanders 0..26 deg as it nears.

outbound_mover: a real fast outbound object t=2..9.5, az 0..9, r 52->115 visible (~12 m/s, vehicle-like). Operator scene notes describe an outbound-then-return leg r 56->145; the fixture window shows this outbound part. Kept as truth so its emissions do not count as ghosts.
truth_complete=false: ghost counts on this fixture are upper bounds.
